name: Pollen VC
description: Pollen VC — Revenue-based financing platform for mobile app and game developers advancing future App Store and Play Store earnings.

seo.title: Pollen VC — In-app Purchase Optimization
seo.meta_description: Pollen VC: Pollen VC — Revenue-based financing platform for mobile app and game developers advancing future App Store and Play Store earnings.

when_to_use: Advancing App Store and Play Store earnings for game developers
Revenue-based financing using app store revenue as collateral
Bridging payout delays for indie mobile game studios

pros: Advances future App Store and Play revenue as capital
Non-dilutive funding for app and game studios
Faster than traditional VC for growth runway
Pricing tied to revenue timing, not equity
cons: Not an IAP tool, miscategorized here
Only useful once you have real store revenue
Cost of capital must beat alternatives
Terms vary by studio size and revenue profile
review.verdict: Interesting revenue-based financing for studios with proven store revenue, but it's fintech, not IAP optimization.
review.best_for: Profitable app and game studios seeking non-dilutive growth capital.
